message:
test(fcp-core): pin PolicyPattern matcher truth table + admission-rule serde shape (flywheel_connectors-bdxjo)

Bead asks for ZoneAdmissionRule JSON+CBOR roundtrip pinning. No type
literally named ZoneAdmissionRule exists in fcp-core; the closest
singular-rule analogue is PolicyPattern at policy.rs:216 — the bounded
glob rule used in ZonePolicyObject's 6 admission lists. The collective
admission-policy struct is pinned by zone_admission_policy_serde.rs;
the singular rule + matcher truth table is residual unpinned territory.

Coverage: PolicyPattern.matches() truth table covering literal exact,
star-glob at suffix/prefix/middle, double-star, single-star matches
empty, ?-glob single ASCII, empty-pattern matches only empty value,
glob is NOT regex (`.` literal sanity). JSON shape pinning with empty
+ Unicode + quote/backslash/newline edge strings, CBOR Value-inspection
on Map { "pattern": Text } shape, JSON+CBOR decode equality,
deterministic byte-for-byte serialization (required for PolicyBundle
hash canonicalization), Vec<PolicyPattern> order preservation through
both round-trips (admission lists must NOT be silently reordered),
admission OR-disjunction semantics via direct .matches() (no engine
coupling), distinct-pattern-distinct-JSON sentinel.

19 tests green via CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-p1-bdxjo cargo test -p
fcp-core --test zone_admission_rule_serde.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
